product_overview: Prioriza is a personal task management web app designed to help users organize work, track focus time, and review productivity from one workspace. It combines task CRUD, multiple task views, calendar planning, analytics, and profile-based work hours setup in a Supabase-backed React app.
core_goals: Create and manage personal tasks and subtasks
Review tasks in list, Kanban, tree, and dashboard views
Open a task workspace to manage checklist items, notes, resources, and focus sessions
Plan tasks across month, week, and day calendar views
Track productivity metrics and focus activity
Set up a user profile and weekly work availability

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign in or create an account to access the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit sign in form -> See the authenticated dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit sign up form -> See the authenticated dashboard

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Lets users create, edit, and delete tasks from the task management area.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Open task creation modal -> Fill in task title, description, priority, and due date -> Submit the form -> See the new task in the list
Navigate to /tasks -> Open an existing task for editing -> Update task details -> Submit the form -> See the updated task information
Navigate to /tasks -> Open a task action for deletion -> Confirm removal -> See the task removed from the list

features.name: Task Workspace with Checklist and Focus Timer
features.description: Provides a full task details workspace for managing subtasks, focus time, and task-specific progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Open a task -> See the task details workspace -> Toggle checklist items -> Add a new checklist item -> Start the focus timer
Navigate to /tasks -> Open a task -> See the task details workspace -> Add a new checklist item -> Mark all checklist items as completed -> Finish the task

Navigate to /tasks -> Open a task -> See the task details workspace -> Add a checklist item -> Try to complete the task with unfinished checklist items -> See the task remain blocked from valid completion

features.name: Task Views and Organization
features.description: Lets users review the same task set in different visual layouts for faster organization and prioritization.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Switch to list view -> Review tasks by priority, status, and due date -> Open a task workspace
Navigate to /tasks -> Switch to Kanban view -> Review tasks by status columns -> Open a task workspace
Navigate to /tasks -> Switch to tree view -> Expand a parent task -> Review nested subtasks -> Open a task workspace

features.name: Planning Calendar
features.description: Helps users view scheduled work across monthly, weekly, and daily calendar layouts and export events.
user_flows: Navigate to /planning -> View the month calendar -> Review tasks placed across dates -> Open a task from the calendar
Navigate to /planning -> Switch to week view -> Review tasks scheduled for the week -> Move through adjacent periods -> Return to today
Navigate to /planning -> Switch to day view -> Review the day schedule and task timing -> Open a task from the day agenda

features.name: Productivity Analytics
features.description: Shows productivity metrics and task performance insights on the analytics page.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> Review task distribution by priority -> Review completion and timing metrics -> Compare planned versus actual effort

features.name: User Profile and Work Hours
features.description: Allows users to update profile details and define weekly availability hours.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Update username and full name -> Add work hour intervals for each day -> Save changes -> See the updated profile information

routes.description: Task list page with Kanban, List, and Tree views
User profile and availability hours setup page

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Click Sign In or Sign Up button

features.name: Task Management
features.description: CRUD actions and listing for tasks
user_interactions: Click Nova to open creation modal
Fill task title, description, priority, and due date
Click delete icon to remove task

features.name: Interactive Checklist and Timer
features.description: Manage subtasks and track focus time
user_interactions: Click on task to open details modal
Click start focus timer to count time

features.name: User Profile and Work Hours
features.description: Setup profile info and work slots
user_interactions: Add work hour intervals for each day of the week
